title: Pyrus vertesica
taxonomy: Pyrus vertesica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose family. It belongs to the genus Pyrus, which includes various species of pear trees. The species name Pyrus vertesica is often used to refer to a specific variety of pear tree. Pyrus vertesica is native to Central Asia and has been introduced to other parts of the world for cultivation. The classification of Pyrus vertesica is further supported by its botanical characteristics and genetic makeup.
